heading: Congressional Record: arrangement, style, contents, and indexes
label: 901 Congressional Record: arrangement, style, contents, and indexes
text: The Joint Committee on Printing shall control the arrangement and style of the Congressional Record, and while providing that it shall be substantially a verbatim report of proceedings, shall take all needed action for the reduction of unnecessary bulk. It shall provide for the publication of an index of the Congressional Record semimonthly during and at the close of sessions of Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 181 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 1328 Stat. 603
